name: mcp_massive
description: Stocks, options & indices market data via Massive.com financial data API. Access real-time and historical prices, quotes, trades, and aggregates for equities, options contracts, ETFs, FX, crypto, and more.

MASSIVE_API_KEY.title: Massive API Key
MASSIVE_API_KEY.description: Your Massive.com API key for accessing market data

tools.name: search_endpoints
tools.description: Search for market data API endpoints and built-in finance functions by natural language query. Use this FIRST to find the right endpoint before calling call_api. Covers stocks, options, forex, crypto, futures, indices, ETFs, and economic data. Use detail='more' to see query parameter docs needed for building call_api requests.

tools.name: call_api
tools.description: Fetch data from a Massive.com REST API endpoint. Use a path from search_endpoints results. Set store_as to save results as an in-memory table for SQL querying with query_data. Paginated responses include a next-page hint with the exact path and params for the follow-up request. The apply parameter runs built-in functions on results — string input values refer to table columns, numeric values are literals. Use search_endpoints with scope='functions' to discover available functions.

tools.name: query_data
tools.description: Run SQL queries against in-memory tables stored via call_api's store_as parameter. Supports standard SELECT queries with CTEs, window functions, JOINs, and scalar subqueries. Special commands: 'SHOW TABLES' lists stored tables, 'DESCRIBE <table>' shows schema, 'DROP TABLE <table>' removes a table. Tables auto-expire after 1 hour. Optionally set apply to post-process query results with built-in financial functions.
